findings.title: Appended data after valid file marker
findings.explanation: Bytes exist after an expected image end marker, which is a common hiding location.

suspicious_sections.analyst_note: High entropy near the end of file can indicate appended compressed or encoded data.

suspicious_items.note: Readable string matches a base64-like character profile.

adversarial_assessment: Entropy spike near file tail may suggest compressed, encrypted, or encoded payload material.
Embedded readable strings could indicate operator error, hidden instructions, or CTF clue placement.

bullets: High: Appended data after valid file marker (Steganography)

recommended_next_actions: Review suspicious offsets before attempting extraction.
